news.t: From Field to Shelf: The ETF Response to Volatile Food Prices
Where BlackRock sees ‘tremendous' market opportunities for ETF investors in 2023 after damage to stocks, bonds

holdings.infoBox: VEGI is an equity ETF with a total of 162 individual holdings. The top holdings are Deere & Company stock at 27.69%, Corteva at 10.05%, Archer-Daniels-Midland Company at 7.14%, Nutrien at 6.03%, and Kubota at 3.34%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Agriculture Producers ETF (VEGI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of companies that are sensitive to agricultural commodity prices. VEGI was launched on Jan 31, 2012 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: MSCI ACWI Select Agriculture Producers IMI
